task_text: Put together an agenda for next week's Q3 kickoff meeting. The meeting is 90 minutes and should cover the most important topics for the team to align on before Q3 starts. Save it as q3_kickoff_agenda.txt.

content.text: Let me first check your working directory for any existing files that might have relevant context (notes, docs, etc.) to inform the agenda.

content.content: ERROR: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: ''

content.text: No existing files to draw from, so I'll craft a well-structured, comprehensive 90-minute Q3 kickoff agenda from scratch and save it now.

input.content:
=========================================================
         Q3 KICKOFF MEETING — AGENDA
         Duration: 90 Minutes
=========================================================

MEETING OBJECTIVES
------------------
- Reflect on Q2 results and extract key learnings
- Align the team on Q3 goals, priorities, and strategy
- Clarify ownership, dependencies, and ways of working
- Leave energized and ready to execute

---------------------------------------------------------
AGENDA
---------------------------------------------------------

[00:00 – 00:05]  1. WELCOME & FRAMING (5 min)
                    • Facilitator opens the meeting
                    • Recap the purpose and desired outcomes
                    • Quick housekeeping (norms, parking lot, etc.)

[00:05 – 00:20]  2. Q2 RETROSPECTIVE (15 min)
                    • High-level review of Q2 results vs. targets
                    • Top wins to celebrate and build on
                    • Key misses and lessons learned
                    • What we are deliberately doing differently in Q3

[00:20 – 00:40]  3. Q3 GOALS & STRATEGY (20 min)
                    • Company / leadership context and priorities
                    • Team-level OKRs / KPIs for Q3
                    • How our work ladders up to company objectives
                    • Q&A on goals and success metrics

[00:40 – 01:00]  4. INITIATIVES & ROADMAP OVERVIEW (20 min)
                    • Walk through the top Q3 initiatives / projects
                    • Prioritization rationale — what's in, what's out
                    • Key milestones and target dates
                    • Dependencies across teams or functions

[01:00 – 01:15]  5. ROLES, OWNERSHIP & WAYS OF WORKING (15 min)
                    • DRI (Directly Responsible Individual) assignments
                    • Cross-functional collaboration expectations
                    • Cadence: standups, reviews, check-ins
                    • Tools, processes, or norms changing in Q3

[01:15 – 01:25]  6. RISKS, BLOCKERS & OPEN QUESTIONS (10 min)
                    • Known risks or headwinds to flag early
                    • Resource or capacity concerns
                    • Open parking-lot items captured during meeting
                    • Decisions needed from leadership

[01:25 – 01:30]  7. WRAP-UP & NEXT STEPS (5 min)
                    • Summarize key decisions made today
                    • Confirm action items, owners, and due dates
                    • Logistics: where will notes/docs live?
                    • Closing words — send the team off motivated!

---------------------------------------------------------
ACTION ITEM TRACKER (to be filled in during meeting)
---------------------------------------------------------

  Action Item                | Owner       | Due Date
  ---------------------------|-------------|----------
                             |             |
                             |             |
                             |             |

---------------------------------------------------------
NOTES / PARKING LOT
---------------------------------------------------------

  •
  •
  •

=========================================================
         Prepared for: Q3 Kickoff | Next Week
=========================================================

content.text:
The agenda has been saved as **q3_kickoff_agenda.txt**! Here's a summary of how the 90 minutes are structured:

| # | Section | Time |
|---|---------|------|
| 1 | Welcome & Framing | 5 min |
| 2 | Q2 Retrospective | 15 min |
| 3 | Q3 Goals & Strategy | 20 min |
| 4 | Initiatives & Roadmap Overview | 20 min |
| 5 | Roles, Ownership & Ways of Working | 15 min |
| 6 | Risks, Blockers & Open Questions | 10 min |
| 7 | Wrap-Up & Next Steps | 5 min |

**A few highlights about the structure:**
- It **opens with context** (Q2 retro) before diving into Q3 so the team has shared grounding.
- The **meaty middle** covers strategy, the roadmap, and ownership — the three things teams most commonly misalign on entering a new quarter.
- It ends with a **dedicated risk/blocker slot** so issues surface early rather than festering.
- There's a built-in **action item tracker and parking lot** so nothing falls through the cracks.

Let me know if you'd like to adjust the timing, add specific agenda items, or turn this into a calendar invite!
